summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TuneDrop music distribution platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but frontend has intermittent authentication session persistence issues.

integration_issues.issue: User authentication state is not consistently maintained across page navigation and refreshes
integration_issues.symptoms: Dashboard sometimes redirects to login page unexpectedly, even after successful login

passed_tests: Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, pricing, platforms)
Dashboard loads correctly (when auth state is maintained)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence issue. The backend authentication is working correctly with proper JWT cookies, but the frontend React auth context is not consistently maintaining the user state across page navigation. Check AuthProvider implementation and cookie handling in the frontend.
